description: CompositionWhite sweatshirt made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, has a white and red hood with drawstrings, full front zipper, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, graphic and flock print branding on the left chest, brand name in graphic print at the back, two hand warmers on the front with asymmetric openings and a ribbed hemFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsEnjoy the chilly evenings in style with hot street food or just chill out with friends this all seasons sweatshirt from manchester united. Crafted from a cotton-polyester blend, this sweatshirt is designed for style and comfort. Layer it over jeans and t-shirts.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height:6' and shoulders:18&rdquo
